case_title: IDEAL NOVAK CORP. VS CALLAGHAN, GRETCHEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,480.00 FILED BY IDEAL NOVAK CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT CALLAGHAN, GRETCHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
POS ENTERED AS TO GRETCHEN CALLAGHAN, BUT SERVICE WAS MADE OUT OF STATE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALLAGHAN, GRETCHEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IDEAL NOVAK CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALLAGHAN, GRETCHEN $2,480.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,525.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
